# Synthetic Parking Shade Note

This distractor source describes shade structures over parking lots. It is
included to check whether agents over-cite related but non-answering evidence.

The note mentions asphalt shade and vehicle comfort. It does not support the
walking-corridor temperature answer, the cooling-center staffing answer, or the
maintenance-cost gap.
